name: backend
description: 1. **Java 17+** - Download and install from [Oracle JDK](https://www.oracle.com/java/technologies/downloads/) or [OpenJDK](https://adoptium.net/) 2. **Maven 3.6+** - Download from [Apache Maven](https://maven.apache.org/download.cgi) or use the included Maven wrapper

scripts.predev: powershell -Command "$pid8089 = (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8089 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).OwningProcess; if ($pid8089) { Stop-Process -Id $pid8089 -Force; Write-Host 'Stopped process on port 8089' }"
